evidencePacket.rollbackPlan: Restore from captured current-user profile backup before any future mutation.
evidencePacket.afterEvidencePlaceholder: Future after-state packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.independentVerificationPlaceholder: Future independent verification packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.privacyRedactionStatement: Private local user paths are redacted.
evidencePacket.failurePropagation: Any missing current-user evidence keeps the decision blocked.
